code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    if not triples:
        return ""
    # Group triples by subject to allow multiple entities
    from collections import defaultdict
    subject_map = defaultdict(list)
    for t in triples:
        subject_map[t.subject].append(t)

    # Simple predicate → phrase templates
    templates = {
        # Airport‑specific predicates
        "cityServed": "serves the city of {obj}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": "is {obj} metres above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": "is {obj} metres above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": "is {obj} feet above sea level",
        # more natural phrasing without redundant unit words
        "runwayLength": "has a runway length of {obj}",
        "runwayName": "has a runway named {obj}",
        "location": "is located in {obj}",
        "operatingOrganisation": "is operated by {obj}",
        "country": "is in {obj}",
        "isPartOf": "is part of {obj}",
        "icaoLocationIdentifier": "ICAO location identifier is {obj}",
        "locationIdentifier": "location identifier is {obj}",
        "iataLocationIdentifier": "IATA location identifier is {obj}",
        "1stRunwayLengthFeet": "has a first runway length of {obj} feet",
        "1stRunwayLengthMetre": "has a first runway length of {obj} metres",
        "1stRunwaySurfaceType": "its first runway has a {obj} surface",
        "1stRunwayNumber": "its first runway number is {obj}",
        "2ndRunwaySurfaceType": "its second runway has a {obj} surface",
        "3rdRunwaySurfaceType": "its third runway has a {obj} surface",
        "4thRunwaySurfaceType": "its fourth runway has a {obj} surface",
        "5thRunwaySurfaceType": "its fifth runway has a {obj} surface",
        "runwaySurfaceType": "runway surface is {obj}",
        # Generic entity predicates
        "leader": "leader is {obj}",
        "capital": "capital is {obj}",
        "language": "language is {obj}",
        "officialLanguage": "official language is {obj}",
        "currency": "currency is {obj}",
        "owner": "owner is {obj}",
        "foundingYear": "was founded in {obj}",
        "founder": "was founded by {obj}",
        "postalCode": "postal code is {obj}",
        "areaCode": "area code is {obj}",
        "largestCity": "largest city is {obj}",
        "countySeat": "county seat is {obj}",
        "mayor": "mayor is {obj}",
        "leaderParty": "leader party is {obj}",
        "leaderTitle": "leader title is {obj}",
        "chief": "chief is {obj}",
        "hubAirport": "hub airport is {obj}",
        "regionServed": "serves region {obj}",
        "nativeName": "native name is {obj}",
        "jurisdiction": "has jurisdiction in {obj}",
        # Biological classification predicates
        "class": "is of the class {obj}",
        "division": "is of the division {obj}",
        "order": "is of the order {obj}",
        "species": "is of the species {obj}",
        "demonym": "demonym is {obj}",
    }

    # Helper to format numbers nicely (remove trailing .0 and add commas)
    def _fmt_number(val: str) -> str:
        try:
            num = float(val.replace(",", ""))
            if num.is_integer():
                num = int(num)
            return f"{num:,}"
        except Exception:
            return val

    # Build a quick lookup of predicates per subject
    info = {sub: {t.predicate: t.object.strip('"') for t in tlist} for sub, tlist in subject_map.items()}
    processed = set()  # keep track of (subject, predicate) already rendered
    sentences = []

    # 1. Combine ICAO and IATA identifiers when both are present
    for sub, preds in info.items():
        if ("icaoLocationIdentifier" in preds) and ("iataLocationIdentifier" in preds):
            icao = preds["icaoLocationIdentifier"]
            iata = preds["iataLocationIdentifier"]
            sentences.append(f"The ICAO location identifier of {sub} is {icao} and the IATA identifier is {iata}.")
            processed.update({(sub, "icaoLocationIdentifier"), (sub, "iataLocationIdentifier")})

    # 2. Combine mayor information with cityServed relationship
    for airport, preds in info.items():
        if ("cityServed" in preds):
            city = preds["cityServed"]
            if city in info and ("mayor" in info[city]):
                mayor = info[city]["mayor"]
                sentences.append(f"{mayor} is the mayor of {city}, which is served by {airport}.")
                processed.update({(airport, "cityServed"), (city, "mayor")})

    # 3. Render remaining triples individually
    for subject, tlist in subject_map.items():
        for t in tlist:
            if (subject, t.predicate) in processed:
                continue
            tmpl = templates.get(t.predicate)
            obj = t.object.strip('"')
            if tmpl:
                phrase = tmpl.format(obj=obj)
            else:
                pred = t.predicate.replace('_', ' ')
                phrase = f"{pred} {obj}"
            # Special handling for a few common predicates
            if t.predicate == "runwayLength":
                sentence = f"The runway length at {subject} is {obj} meters."
            elif t.predicate == "1stRunwaySurfaceType":
                sentence = f"The first runway at {subject} is made from {obj}."
            elif t.predicate == "2ndRunwaySurfaceType":
                sentence = f"The second runway at {subject} has a {obj.lower()} surface."
            elif t.predicate == "3rdRunwaySurfaceType":
                sentence = f"The third runway at {subject} has a {obj.lower()} surface."
            elif t.predicate == "4thRunwaySurfaceType":
                sentence = f"The fourth runway at {subject} has a {obj.lower()} surface."
            elif t.predicate == "5thRunwaySurfaceType":
                sentence = f"The fifth runway at {subject} has a {obj.lower()} surface."
            elif t.predicate == "locationIdentifier":
                sentence = f"The location identifier for {subject} is {obj}."
            elif t.predicate == "icaoLocationIdentifier":
                sentence = f"The ICAO location identifier of {subject} is {obj}."
            elif t.predicate == "iataLocationIdentifier":
                sentence = f"The IATA location identifier of {subject} is {obj}."
            elif t.predicate == "capital":
                sentence = f"The capital of {subject} is {obj}."
            elif t.predicate == "language":
                lang = obj
                if lang.lower().endswith(" language"):
                    lang = lang[:-len(" language")]
                sentence = f"The language of {subject} is {lang}."
            elif t.predicate == "officialLanguage":
                lang = obj
                if lang.lower().endswith(" language"):
                    lang = lang[:-len(" language")]
                sentence = f"The official language of {subject} is {lang}."
            elif t.predicate == "demonym":
                sentence = f"The people of {subject} are called {obj}."
            elif t.predicate == "leader":
                sentence = f"The leader of {subject} is {obj}."
            elif t.predicate == "country":
                article = "the " if obj.startswith("United") else ""
                sentence = f"{subject} is in {article}{obj}."
            elif t.predicate == "currency":
                sentence = f"The currency of {subject} is the {obj}."
            else:
                sentence = f"{subject} {phrase}."
            sentences.append(sentence)

    return " ".join(sentences)

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
